prompt: [Character Pose and Expression] This is a low-angle pose looking down confidently at the camera from the bottom center of the Eiffel Tower. The upper body is turned 45 degrees toward the right of the frame, and the head is turned to look down at the camera. A sophisticated and cool expression is worn through the hair blowing in the wind, staring at the camera with a lingering yet confident gaze. [Character Outfit] Wearing a neat and simple white short-sleeved round-neck t-shirt that gently fits the body. [Character Hair and Makeup Details] The hair has natural volume from the wind and is scattered around the face. Wearing square sunglasses with silver metal frames and translucent lenses with a subtle purple tint, with natural and clean makeup applying moist light pink lip gloss. [Lighting and Light Direction] There is no direct lighting on the character, only subtle natural light under the Eiffel Tower. The deep shadows under the massive structure contrast with the character's sophisticated silhouette, highlighting it more clearly and cleanly. [Texture and Color Mood] The soft cotton texture of the t-shirt and the rough, solid metal texture of the Eiffel Tower structure filling the background form a sharp contrast. The bright colors of white and black harmonize with the steel frame and blue sky, creating a chic and trendy Paris travel pictorial mood. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] Taken at an extreme low angle (worm's eye view) looking almost vertically from the ground to the sky. A close-up shot composition that fills the screen from the waist to the face, using a clear smartphone camera lens to focus on the person in front and naturally out-focus the giant steel structure behind. [Background Elements (Optional)] Elaborate and massive dark gray steel lattice structure of the Paris Eiffel Tower crossing and surrounding the entire screen. The complex and geometric details of the arched steel pillars fill the space right behind the person as if overwhelming them, and a clear and bright blue sky can be seen clearly through the gaps in the dense steel frame. [Sign] In the lower right, the Threads logo operated by Meta is small, and "CHAse" is written above it in white cursive like a signature. 4.5 ratio.
